descriptionShort: Trevor Hendry, a left winger from the Richmond Sockeyes, scores five goals in his first two games with the Fort McMurray Oil Barons.
descriptionLong: Trevor Hendry, a six-foot-two, 185-pound left winger from the B.C. Junior Hockey League's Richmond Sockeyes, was acquired by the Fort McMurray Oil Barons in a trade for Dean Rutledge. In his first two games, Hendry scored five goals and added three assists against the Hobbema Hawks, playing alongside centre Brian Shantz and right winger Barry Kress.

attribution.headline: Sockeyes' Hendry Makes Splash with Oil Barons
